response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-adjacent work, and recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume shows limited depth in production GenAI systems, no explicit RAG/vector database experience, no demonstrated multi-agent framework work (LangGraph/CrewAI), and no clear track record of customer-facing technical leadership at the staff level required for a Forward Deployed role. The GenAI experience appears recent (under 1 year) versus the 8+ years of production AI required.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background with TypeScript, Node.js, and distributed systems
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow infrastructure
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source platform ownership
concerns: Lacks the 8+ years of production AI/GenAI experience the role requires
No explicit RAG, vector database, or multi-agent framework (LangGraph/CrewAI) experience listed
Limited evidence of customer-facing discovery or enterprise consulting delivery

key_factors.factor: Insufficient production GenAI tenure vs 8+ year requirement
Recent MCP and agentic tooling experience at re:cinq
